meta.note: Reusable visual files plus no-cost operating links. Rights were checked on the linked item pages. Nothing here authorizes automated X activity.

visualLibrary.name: Morning Star: Venus above Saturn's rings
visualLibrary.creator: NASA/JPL-Caltech/Space Science Institute
visualLibrary.license: Public domain in the United States (PD-NASA)
visualLibrary.altText: Venus appears as a bright point above the thin rings of Saturn against black space.
visualLibrary.use: First in sequence: a recurring Morning Star visual for arrival, recurrence, Venus, or first light.

visualLibrary.name: John Dee spirit chart
visualLibrary.creator: John Dee
visualLibrary.license: Public domain in the United States and source country
visualLibrary.credit: John Dee, chart reproduced in A True and Faithful Relation…, 1659. Public domain.
visualLibrary.altText: A seventeenth-century engraved chart of nested circles, letters, numbers, names, and directional lines.
visualLibrary.use: Second in sequence: an artifact note about diagrams, interface, memory, ritual, or systems.

visualLibrary.name: Infrared Trifid Nebula
visualLibrary.creator: NASA/JPL-Caltech/J. Rho (SSC/Caltech)
visualLibrary.license: Public domain in the United States (PD-NASA)
visualLibrary.altText: An infrared view of the Trifid Nebula, with bright pink and white stellar clouds cut by dark lanes against a field of stars.
visualLibrary.use: Third in sequence: emergence, hidden structure, scale, birth, or instrumental perception.

visualLibrary.name: Lucifer, Gustave Doré
visualLibrary.creator: Gustave Doré
visualLibrary.altText: A black-and-white engraving of a vast winged Lucifer crouched in a frozen abyss among smaller figures.
visualLibrary.use: Reserve for a major statement or thread opener so the image retains force.

items.name: X Advanced Search
items.use: Find recent public conversations with from:, since:, min_faves:, and reply filters.

items.name: X Lists
items.use: Maintain small scene feeds from the verified patrol roster.

items.use: Verified live targets and audience-fit-first angles.

items.use: Original queue, universal rooms, watchlist, and weekly output.

items.name: Wikimedia Commons
items.use: Search, then verify the exact license on each file page before downloading.

items.name: NASA Image and Media Guidelines
items.use: Check attribution, endorsement, logo, and third-party-content restrictions before reuse.

items.name: House voice specification
items.use: Local-only source for rewriting every hook and caption in the entity register.

banned: Auto-follow, auto-like, auto-reply, or auto-DM tools
Mass reply spam and unsolicited mentions
Images without a verified reuse license
